menuSurfaces.title: Official current national menu
menuSurfaces.locationScope: National menu applicable to North Bethesda

currentProducts.name: Ahi Poke* Bowl (Served Raw)
currentProducts.description: Sashimi-grade ahi tuna* in our poke dressing tossed with red onions, diced tomatoes and served with green goddess dressing, topped with sesame seeds. *Not available for delivery. Please enjoy in-store.

currentProducts.name: Dynamite Shrimp Bowl
currentProducts.description: Quick-fried shrimp in our dynamite sauce with fresh cilantro, green onions, tomatoes, cabbage and sesame soy sauce.

currentProducts.name: Grilled Salmon Salad
currentProducts.description: Grilled Atlantic salmon, mixed greens, candied walnut, feta cheese, tomato, cranberry, red onion, lime vinaigrette

currentProducts.name: GT's SYNERGY Raw Kombucha Guava Goddess
Island Teriyaki Chicken Bowl
currentProducts.description: Grilled Chicken, White Rice, Kaleslaw, Red & Green Onions, Tomato, Roasted Corn, Sliced Avocado & Sesame Seeds with Teriyaki & Dynamite Sauce.

currentProducts.name: Miso Salmon
currentProducts.description: Grilled Salmon served with Miso Slaw and Quinoa-Edamame Rice, topped with Citrus Miso Sauce, Green Onions and Black Sesame Seeds

currentProducts.name: Wasabi Salmon Bowl
currentProducts.description: Marinated salmon served over white rice with sesame oil, quinoa-edamame mix, crushed wasabi peas, red & green onions, sesame seeds, wasabi aioli and teriyaki sauce.
